messages.lastMessage: Hi Gloria, I wanted to let you know my blood pressure was 148/92 this morning. Should I be concerned?

messages.text: Hi Gloria, I wanted to let you know my blood pressure was 148/92 this morning. Should I be concerned?

messages.lastMessage: I'm having trouble picking up my new inhaler from the pharmacy. They said there's an insurance issue.

messages.text: Hi James, how are you feeling since your discharge last week?
Doing okay, but I'm having trouble picking up my new inhaler from the pharmacy. They said there's an insurance issue.

messages.lastMessage: That's great to hear, Robert. Keep up with the cardiac rehab sessions and let me know if you need anything.

messages.text: Hi, I wanted to confirm my cardiac rehab appointment for Thursday.
Hi Robert! Yes, your appointment is confirmed for Thursday at 10am at the Evergreen Rehab Center.
Thank you! I've been feeling much better this week.
That's great to hear, Robert. Keep up with the cardiac rehab sessions and let me know if you need anything.

messages.lastMessage: Can we reschedule my follow-up? I have a conflict on Tuesday.

messages.text: Can we reschedule my follow-up? I have a conflict on Tuesday.

messages.lastMessage: Thank you for everything, Gloria. I'm feeling much more confident with the exercises now.

messages.text: Hi Dorothy, just checking in on your physical therapy progress. How are the exercises going?
Thank you for everything, Gloria. I'm feeling much more confident with the exercises now.

messages.lastMessage: Your medication adjustment has been approved. The pharmacy will have it ready tomorrow.

messages.text: Gloria, I'm running low on my Lisinopril. Can you help with a refill?
Your medication adjustment has been approved. The pharmacy will have it ready tomorrow.

messages.lastMessage: Sounds good. I'll bring the oxygen log to the appointment.

messages.text: Hi James, just a reminder about your follow-up appointment tomorrow at 10am. Please bring your oxygen usage log.
Sounds good. I'll bring the oxygen log to the appointment.

messages.lastMessage: Great work, Robert! Keep it up. I'll check in again after your Thursday session.

messages.text: Hi Gloria, I completed my first cardiac rehab session yesterday. It went well!
That's wonderful news! How was your heart rate during the exercises?
They said it stayed in the target zone. I was a bit tired after but felt good overall.
Great work, Robert! Keep it up. I'll check in again after your Thursday session.

messages.lastMessage: I've arranged for a grab bar installation this Friday. The contractor will call you to confirm a time.

messages.text: Gloria, I almost slipped in the bathroom yesterday. Is there something we can do about safety?
I'm so sorry to hear that, Dorothy. Are you okay? I'll look into getting grab bars installed right away.
I'm fine, just shaken up. That would be wonderful, thank you.
I've arranged for a grab bar installation this Friday. The contractor will call you to confirm a time.

messages.lastMessage: Welcome home, Margaret! Remember to weigh yourself every morning and call if you gain more than 2 lbs in a day.

messages.text: Hi Margaret, I wanted to let you know your discharge is confirmed for today. Your daughter will be picking you up at 2pm.
Thank you so much for everything, Gloria. I feel much better.
Welcome home, Margaret! Remember to weigh yourself every morning and call if you gain more than 2 lbs in a day.

messages.lastMessage: Perfect. I've sent the referral to the pulmonologist. They should call you within 48 hours to schedule.

messages.text: Hi Gloria, my doctor mentioned I should see a lung specialist. Can you help set that up?
Of course! I'll send a referral to Dr. Park at the Evergreen Pulmonology Clinic. Any day preferences?
Tuesdays or Thursdays work best for me.
Perfect. I've sent the referral to the pulmonologist. They should call you within 48 hours to schedule.

messages.lastMessage: The oxygen equipment has been delivered. The technician confirmed setup is complete. Call the number on the unit if you have questions.

messages.text: Gloria, when is the home oxygen being delivered? I was told it would be this week.
Let me check with the DME company. I'll get back to you shortly.
The oxygen equipment has been delivered. The technician confirmed setup is complete. Call the number on the unit if you have questions.
